name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Clayton is an all-in-one indoor golf and entertainment facility in the St. Louis metro area. It combines elite golf technology with a vibrant social atmosphere, featuring an 8,300 square foot venue with 10 premium Trackman simulator bays. The facility offers access to 200+ PGA Tour venue courses, along with golf minigames and multi-sport simulators. Patrons can enjoy a full-service bar with a chef-curated menu, craft cocktails, and local beers on tap. The venue is designed as a world-class one-stop-shop for fun, offering golf practice, lessons, events, and social gatherings in a modern, accessible environment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology provides accurate data for practice and improvement
Access to 200+ PGA Tour courses allows for playing world-renowned venues
On-site PGA-certified coaches offer structured lessons and club fitting services
Full-service bar and food menu create a social atmosphere for golf and entertainment
Flexible booking options for individual play, group events, and league participation

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-curated menu available, featuring options like boneless wings
Full-service bar with craft cocktails and local beers on tap

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual-radar Trackman technology with multiple high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full-service bar and chef-curated menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on the course and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf Clayton offers kids' parties and junior clinics, making it suitable for families with children.
